key_issues: NON-BLOCKING: resultType modeled as OPTIONAL while _meta modeled as REQUIRED, but BOTH are required (no '?') in the .d.ts (Result.resultType line 187; RequestParams._meta line 133). The optional-resultType choice is defensible (the resultType JSDoc explicitly sanctions absent-as-'complete' for backward compat; _meta has no such allowance), but the spec states a blanket 'follow the .d.ts' rule for _meta while silently doing the opposite for resultType. Add one sentence to Decisions acknowledging the intentional asymmetry.

NON-BLOCKING: ListRootsResult open question ('confirm _meta during impl', spec O2 lines 412-413) can be resolved now: ListRootsResult (spec.types:2556) is a BARE interface { roots: Root[] } only -- does NOT extend Result, no _meta/resultType/rest; ListRootsRequest (2534) is also bare. Pin this in O2 so the implementer does not bolt the generic meta?/result-type?/rest trio onto list-roots-result (would emit phantom keys and break round-trip parity).
MINOR: cross-reference the EmptyResult=Result alias with the resultType-optional decision so the empty-result fixture and the resultType call are clearly the same decision.
